//: Add this 'sentinel' entry to your MCP client config and restart the client.
//paths: Claude Desktop: ~/.config/Claude/claude_desktop_config.json (Linux) or %APPDATA%/Claude/claude_desktop_config.json (Windows). Claude Code: run `claude mcp add` or edit ~/.claude.json.
//replace: Use absolute paths. Point 'command' at the Python that has the deps installed (e.g. the project venv), and the script path at this repo.
